leadText: The Big Malasada (Japanese: おおきいマラサダ Big Malasada) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation VII. It is a local specialty of the Alola region and cures a Pokémon from all non-volatile status conditions and confusion.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures a Pokémon of all non-volatile status conditions ( poison , paralysis , sleep , burn , freeze ) and confusion .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The Alola region's local specialty—fried bread. It can be used once to heal all the status conditions of a Pokémon. S V The Alola region's famous fried confection. It can be used to cure any status condition a Pokémon may have.
